'''鈭歮-l-dh-f''' ('''kamaldhefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:voxelize|voxelize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-l-dh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voxelize|voxelize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-l-dh-f
|-
! Lemma
| kamaldhefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimaldhefoko|thimaldhefoko]] || [[word:jimaldhefoko|jimaldhefoko]] || [[word:shimaldhefoko|shimaldhefoko]] || [[word:kimaldhefoko|kimaldhefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumaldhefoko|thuthumaldhefoko]] || [[word:jujumaldhefoko|jujumaldhefoko]] || [[word:shushumaldhefoko|shushumaldhefoko]] || [[word:kukumaldhefoko|kukumaldhefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumaldhefoko|thumaldhefoko]] || [[word:jumaldhefoko|jumaldhefoko]] || [[word:shumaldhefoko|shumaldhefoko]] || [[word:kumaldhefoko|kumaldhefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomaldhefoko|thomaldhefoko]] || [[word:jomaldhefoko|jomaldhefoko]] || [[word:shomaldhefoko|shomaldhefoko]] || [[word:komaldhefoko|komaldhefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
